title: languas angustifolia
intro: Languas angustifolia, also known as Thai ginger or narrow leaf langas, is a type of tropical plant belonging to the Zingiberaceae family. The plant is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Languas angustifolia include reducing nausea and vomiting, alleviating pain and fever, and promoting digestion. Languas angustifolia is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional cooking and as a garnish in various Asian dishes.
